text: Excellent selection of baked goods. Granola yogurt is amazing.

Large latte and ham cheese croissant. Latte perfect balance.
Strawberry matcha lemonade decently good. Good spot to do work.
Matcha and sandwich. Specialty drinks amazing.
Graham cracker latte hit the spot.
Ground coffee handed loose in bags. Used to be loyal visitor.
Best almond croissant in the neighborhood. Espresso always on point.
Spanish latte is my go-to. Busy on weekends but worth the wait.
Chai latte and a scone — perfect afternoon pick-me-up.
